   /// Aggregate per-shard preflight responses into global IDF.\n66\t    pub fn from_preflight_responses(responses: &[PreflightResponse]) -> Self {\n67\t        let mut total_docs = 0u64;\n68\t        let mut total_length = 0.0f64;\n69\t        let mut term_df: HashMap<String, u64> = HashMap::new();\n70\t\n71\t        for resp in responses {\n72\t            total_docs += resp.total_docs;\n73\t            total_length += resp.avg_doc_length * resp.total_docs as f64;\n74\t            for (term, stats) in &resp.term_stats {\n75\t                *term_df.entry(term.clone()).or_insert(0) += stats.df;\n76\t            }\n77\t        }\n78\t\n79\t        let avg_doc_length = if total_docs > 0 {\n80\t            total_length / total_docs as f64\n81\t        } else {\n82\t            0.0\n83\t        };\n84\t\n85\t        let n = total_docs as f64;\n86\t        let terms = term_df\n87\t            .into_iter()\n88\t            .map(|(term, df)| {\n89\t                let idf = if df == 0 {\n90\t                    0.0\n91\t                } else {\n92\t                    ((n - df as f64 + 0.5) / (df as f64 + 0.5)).ln() + 1.0\n93\t                };\n94\t                (term, GlobalTermStats { df, idf })\n95\t            })\n96\t            .collect();\n97\t\n98\t        Self { total_docs, avg_doc_length, terms }\n99\t    }\n100\t}\n101\t\n102\t// {\n309\t    Timeout,\n310\t    HttpError { status: u16, body: String },\n311\t    NetworkError(String),\n312\t}\n313\t\n314\t#[derive(Debug, Clone)]\n315\tpub struct SearchRequest {\n316\t    pub   pub ranking_score: bool,\n323\t    pub body: Value,\n324\t    /// Global IDF data from the preflight phase (OP#4).\n325\t    pub global_idf: Option<GlobalIdf>,\n326\t}\n327\t\n328\timpl SearchRequest {\n329\t    /// Build the request body for sending to a node.\n330\t    ///\n331\t    /// Injects `showRankingScore: true` unconditionally so the merger can global-sort.\n332\t    /// Each node receives `offset + limit` results to ensure the coordinator has enough\n333\t    /// data to apply pagination.\n334\t    pub fn to_node_body(&self) -> Value {\n335\t        let mut body = self.body.clone();\n336\t\n337\t        // Inject showRankingScore: true unconditionally for global sorting\n338\t        body[\"showRankingScore\"] = serde_json::json!(true);\n339\t\n340\t        // Set limit to offset + limit so we get enough results for pagination\n341\t        // (coordinator applies final offset/limit after merging)\n342\t        body[\"limit\"] = serde_json::json!(self.offset + self.limit);\n343\t\n344\t        // Set offset to 0 on individual nodes (coordinator handles offset)\n345\t        body[\"offset\"] = serde_json::json!(0);\n346\t\n347\t        // Ensure query is set\n348\t        if let Some(q) = &self.query {\n349\t            body[\"q\"] = serde_json::json!(q);\n350\t        }\n351\t\n352\t        // Ensure filter is set if provided\n353\t        if let Some(filter) = &self.filter {\n354\t            body[\"filter\"] = filter.clone();\n355\t        }\n356\t\n357\t        // Ensure facets are set if provided\n358\t        if let Some(facets) = &self.facets {\n359\t            body[\"facets\"] = serde_json::json!(facets);\n360\t        }\n361\t\n362\t        body\n363\t    }\n364\t}\n365\t\n366\t#[derive(Debug)]\n367\tpub struct ScatterResult {\n368\t    pub shard_pages: Vec<ShardHitPage>,\n369\t    pub failed_shards: HashMap<u32, NodeError>,\n370\t    pub partial: bool,\n371\t    pub deadline_exceeded: bool,\n372\t}\n373\t\n374\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(query_seq, rf, shard_count))]\n375\tpub fn plan_search_scatter(\n376\t    topology: &Topology,\n377\t    query_seq: u64,\n378\t    rf: usize,\n379\t    shard_count: u32,\n380\t) -> ScatterPlan {\n381\t    let chosen_group = query_group(query_seq, topology.replica_group_count());\n382\t\n383\t    let group = match topology.group(chosen_group) {\n384\t        Some(g) => g,\n385\t        None => {\n386\t            return ScatterPlan {\n387\t                chosen_group, target_shards: covering_set(shard_count, group, rf, query_seq);\n394\t\n395\t    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n396\t    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n397\t        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n398\t        let selected = replicas[(query_seq as usize) % replicas.len()].clone();\n399\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n400\t    }\n401\t\n402\t    ScatterPlan {\n403\t        chosen_group,\n404\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n405\t        shard_to_node,\n406\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n407\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n408\t    }\n409\t}\n410\t\n411\t/// Plan search scatter with settings version floor filtering (plan §13.5).\n412\t///\n413\t/// Excludes nodes whose settings version for the given index is below `floor`.\n414\t/// Returns None if no covering set can be assembled (caller should return 503).\n415\tpub fn plan_search_scatter_with_version_floor(\n416\t    topology: &Topology,\n417\t    query_seq: u64,\n418\t    rf: usize,\n419\t    shard_count: u32,\n420\t    index: &str,\n421\t    floor: u64,\n422\t    version_checker: &impl Fn(&str, &str) -> u64,\n423\t) -> Option<ScatterPlan> {\n424\t    let chosen_group = query_group(query_seq, topology.replica_group_count());\n425\t\n426\t    let group = topology.group(chosen_group)?;\n427\t\n428\t    let covering = covering_set_with_version_floor(\n429\t        shard_count,\n430\t        group,\n431\t        rf,\n432\t        query_seq,\n433\t        index,\n434\t        floor,\n435\t        version_checker,\n436\t    )?;\n437\t\n438\t    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n439\t    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n440\t        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n441\t        // Filter by version floor, then rotate by query_seq\n442\t        let eligible: Vec<_> = replicas\n443\t            .iter()\n444\t            .filter(|node_id| {\n445\t                let version = version_checker(index, node_id.as_str());\n446\t                version >= floor\n447\t            })\n448\t            .collect();\n449\t\n450\t        if eligible.is_empty() {\n451\t            return None;\n452\t        }\n453\t\n454\t        let selected = eligible[query_seq as usize % eligible.len()];\n455\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected.clone());\n456\t    }\n457\t\n458\t    Some(ScatterPlan {\n459\t        chosen_group,\n460\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n461\t        shard_to_node,\n462\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n463\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n464\t    })\n465\t}\n466\t\n467\t/// Plan search scatter for a specific replica group (plan §13.6 session pinning).\n468\t///\n469\t/// Used when a session has a pending write and needs to read from the pinned group\n470\t/// to ensure read-your-writes consistency.\n471\tpub fn plan_search_scatter_for_group(\n472\t    topology: &Topology,\n473\t    query_seq: u64,\n474\t    rf: usize,\n475\t    shard_count: u32,\n476\t    pinned_group: u32,\n477\t) -> Option<ScatterPlan> {\n478\t    let group = topology.group(pinned_group)?;\n479\t\n480\t    let mut shard_to_node = HashMap::new();\n481\t    for shard_id in 0..shard_count {\n482\t        let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), rf);\n483\t        if replicas.is_empty() {\n484\t            continue;\n485\t        }\n486\t        let selected = replicas[query_seq as usize % replicas.len()].clone();\n487\t        shard_to_node.insert(shard_id, selected);\n488\t    }\n489\t\n490\t    Some(ScatterPlan {\n491\t        chosen_group: pinned_group,\n492\t        target_shards: (0..shard_count).collect(),\n493\t        shard_to_node,\n494\t        deadline_ms: 5000,\n495\t        hedging_eligible: group.node_count() > 1,\n496\t    })\n497\t}\n498\t\n499\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(node_count))]\n500\tpub async fn execute_scatter<C: NodeClient>(\n501\t    plan: ScatterPlan,\n502\t    client: &C,\n503\t    req: SearchRequest,\n504\t    topology: &Topology,\n505\t    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n506\t) -> Result<ScatterResult> {\n507\t    let mut node_to_shards: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n508\t    for (&shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n509\t        if plan.target_shards.contains(&shard_id) {\n510\t            node_to_shards.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().push(shard_id);\n511\t        }\n512\t    }\n513\t    tracing::Span::current().record(\"node_count\", node_to_shards.len());\n514\t\n515\t    let mut shard_pages = Vec::new();\n516\t    let mut failed_shards = HashMap::new();\n517\t    let mut deadline_exceeded = false;\n518\t\n519\t    let mut tasks = Vec::new();\n520\t    for (node_id, shards) in node_to_shards {\n521\t        let node = match topology.node(&node_id) {\n522\t            Some(n) => n.clone(),\n523\t            None => {\n524\t                for shard_id in shards {\n525\t                    failed_shards.insert(shard_id, NodeError::NetworkError(\"node not in topology\".to_string()));\n526\t                }\n527\t                continue;\n528\t            }\n529\t        };\n530\t        let client_ref = client;\n531\t        let req_clone = req.clone();\n532\t        let node_id_clone = node_id.clone();\n533\t        let shard_count = shards.len();\n534\t        // Create a span for this node's scatter call\n535\t        let span = info_span!(\n536\t            \"scatter_node\",\n537\t            node_id = %node_id_clone,\n538\t            address = %node.address,\n539\t            shard_count = shard_count,\n540\t        );\n541\t        tasks.push(async move {\n542\t            let result = client_ref.search_node(&node_id_clone, &node.address, &req_clone).await;\n543\t            (node_id_clone, shards, result)\n544\t        }.instrument(span));\n545\t    }\n546\t\n547\t    let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n548\t\n549\t    for (_node_id, shards, result) in results {\n550\t        match result {\n551\t            Ok(body) => {\n552\t                for _shard_id in shards {\n553\t                    shard_pages.push(ShardHitPage { body: body.clone() });\n554\t                }\n555\t            }\n556\t            Err(NodeError::Timeout) => {\n557\t                deadline_exceeded = true;\n558\t                for shard_id in shards { failed_shards.insert(shard_id, NodeError::Timeout); }\n559\t            }\n560\t            Err(e) => {\n561\t                for shard_id in shards { failed_shards.insert(shard_id, e.clone()); }\n562\t            }\n563\t        }\n564\t    }\n565\t\n566\t    let partial = !failed_shards.is_empty();\n567\t\n568\t    match policy {\n569\t        UnavailableShardPolicy::Error => {\n570\t            if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n571\t                return Err(crate::error::MiroirError::Routing(format!(\"{} shard(s) unavailable\", failed_shards.len())));\n572\t            }\n573\t        }\n574\t        UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial => {}\n575\t        UnavailableShardPolicy::Fallback => {\n576\t            // Group-unavailability fallback: try other replica groups for failed shards\n577\t            if !failed_shards.is_empty() {\n578\t                let mut fallback_pages = Vec::new();\n579\t                let mut remaining_failed = HashMap::new();\n580\t\n581\t                for (&shard_id, error) in &failed_shards {\n582\t                    let mut fallback_succeeded = false;\n583\t\n584\t                    // Try each other replica group\n585\t                    for group_id in 0..topology.replica_group_count() {\n586\t                        if group_id == plan.chosen_group {\n587\t                            continue; // Skip the already-tried group\n588\t                        }\n589\t\n590\t                        if let Some(group) = topology.group(group_id) {\n591\t                            let replicas = crate::router::assign_shard_in_group(shard_id, group.nodes(), topology.rf());\n592\t                            if replicas.is_empty() {\n593\t                                continue;\n594\t                            }\n595\t\n596\t                            // Try each replica in the fallback group\n597\t                            for node_id in replicas {\n598\t                                if let Some(node) = topology.node(&node_id) {\n599\t                                    match client.search_node(&node_id, &node.address, &req).await {\n600\t                                        Ok(body) => {\n601\t                                            fallback_pages.push(ShardHitPage { body });\n602\t                                            fallback_succeeded = true;\n603\t                                            break;\n604\t                                        }\n605\t                                        Err(_) => {\n606\t                                            continue; // Try next replica\n607\t                                        }\n608\t                                    }\n609\t                                }\n610\t                            }\n611\t\n612\t                            if fallback_succeeded {\n613\t                                break; // Found a working replica\n614\t                            }\n615\t                        }\n616\t                    }\n617\t\n618\t                    if !fallback_succeeded {\n619\t                        remaining_failed.insert(shard_id, error.clone());\n620\t                    }\n621\t                }\n622\t\n623\t                // Merge fallback results\n624\t                shard_pages.extend(fallback_pages);\n625\t\n626\t                // Update failed_shards with only those that truly failed\n627\t                if remaining_failed.is_empty() {\n628\t                    // All shards succeeded via fallback\n629\t                    return Ok(ScatterResult {\n630\t                        shard_pages,\n631\t                        failed_shards: HashMap::new(),\n632\t                        partial: false,\n633\t                        deadline_exceeded,\n634\t                    });\n635\t                } else {\n636\t                    // Some shards still failed\n637\t                    failed_shards = remaining_failed;\n638\t                }\n639\t            }\n640\t        }\n641\t    }\n642\t\n643\t    Ok(ScatterResult { shard_pages, failed_shards, partial, deadline_exceeded })\n644\t}\n645\t\n646\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %req.index_uid))]\n647\tpub async fn scatter_gather_search<C: NodeClient>(\n648\t    plan: ScatterPlan,\n649\t    client: &C,\n650\t    req: SearchRequest,\n651\t    topology: &Topology,\n652\t    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n653\t    strategy: &dyn MergeStrategy,\n654\t) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n655\t    let scatter_result = execute_scatter(plan, client, req.clone(), topology, policy).await?;\n656\t\n657\t    let mut shard_pages = scatter_result.shard_pages;\n658\t    if scatter_result.partial {\n659\t        for shard_id in scatter_result.failed_shards.keys() {\n660\t            shard_pages.push(ShardHitPage {\n661\t                body: serde_json::json!({\"success\": false, \"message\": format!(\"shard {} unavailable\", shard_id)}),\n662\t            });\n663\t        }\n664\t    }\n665\t\n666\t    // Collect failed shard IDs for the X-Miroir-Degraded header\n667\t    let failed_shards: Vec<u32> = scatter_result.failed_shards.keys().copied().collect();\n668\t\n669\t    let merge_input = MergeInput {\n670\t        shard_hits: shard_pages,\n671\t        offset: req.offset,\n672\t        limit: req.limit,\n673\t        client_requested_score: req.ranking_score,\n674\t        facets: req.facets.clone(),\n675\t        failed_shards,\n676\t    };\n677\t\n678\t    // Span for the merge operation\n679\t    let _span = info_span!(\n680\t        \"merge\",\n681\t        shard_count = merge_input.shard_hits.len(),\n682\t        offset = req.offset,\n683\t        limit = req.limit,\n684\t    ).entered();\n685\t\n686\t    strategy.merge(merge_input)\n687\t}\n688\t\n689\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n690\t// OP#4: Global-IDF preflight execution\n691\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n692\t\n693\t/// Extract unique query terms from a search query string.\n694\tpub fn extract_query_terms(query: &Option<String>) -> Vec<String> {\n695\t    match query {\n696\t        Some(q) if !q.is_empty() => {\n697\t            let mut seen = std::collections::HashSet::new();\n698\t            let mut terms = Vec::new();\n699\t            for term in q.split_whitespace() {\n700\t                let lower = term.to_lowercase();\n701\t                if seen.insert(lower.clone()) { terms.push(lower); }\n702\t            }\n703\t            terms\n704\t        }\n705\t        _ => Vec::new(),\n706\t    }\n707\t}\n708\t\n709\t/// Execute the preflight phase: gather term frequencies from all shards.\n710\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(node_count, term_count = req.terms.len()))]\n711\tpub async fn execute_preflight<C: NodeClient>(\n712\t    plan: &ScatterPlan,\n713\t    client: &C,\n714\t    req: &PreflightRequest,\n715\t    topology: &Topology,\n716\t) -> Result<GlobalIdf> {\n717\t    if req.terms.is_empty() {\n718\t        return Ok(GlobalIdf { total_docs: 0, avg_doc_length: 0.0, terms: HashMap::new() });\n719\t    }\n720\t\n721\t    let mut node_to_shards: HashMap<NodeId, Vec<u32>> = HashMap::new();\n722\t    for (&shard_id, node_id) in &plan.shard_to_node {\n723\t        if plan.target_shards.contains(&shard_id) {\n724\t            node_to_shards.entry(node_id.clone()).or_default().push(shard_id);\n725\t        }\n726\t    }\n727\t\n728\t    let mut tasks = Vec::new();\n729\t    for (node_id, _) in node_to_shards {\n730\t        let node = match topology.node(&node_id) {\n731\t            Some(n) => n.clone(),\n732\t            None => continue,\n733\t        };\n734\t        let client_ref = client;\n735\t        let req_clone = req.clone();\n736\t        let nid = node_id.clone();\n737\t        tasks.push(async move { client_ref.preflight_node(&nid, &node.address, &req_clone).await });\n738\t    }\n739\t\n740\t    let results = futures_util::future::join_all(tasks).await;\n741\t    let responses: Vec<PreflightResponse> = results.into_iter().filter_map(|r| r.ok()).collect();\n742\t    Ok(GlobalIdf::from_preflight_responses(&responses))\n743\t}\n744\t\n745\t/// Execute a full dfs_query_then_fetch search (OP#4 global-IDF preflight).\n746\t#[instrument(skip_all, fields(index = %req.index_uid))]\n747\tpub async fn dfs_query_then_fetch_search<C: NodeClient>(\n748\t    plan: ScatterPlan,\n749\t    client: &C,\n750\t    req: SearchRequest,\n751\t    topology: &Topology,\n752\t    policy: UnavailableShardPolicy,\n753\t    strategy: &dyn MergeStrategy,\n754\t) -> Result<MergedSearchResult> {\n755\t    let preflight_req = PreflightRequest {\n756\t        index_uid: req.index_uid.clone(),\n757\t        terms: extract_query_terms(&req.query),\n758\t        filter: req.filter.clone(),\n759\t    };\n760\t    let global_idf = execute_preflight(&plan, client, &preflight_req, topology).await?;\n761\t    let mut search_req = req;\n762\t    search_req.global_idf = Some(global_idf);\n763\t    scatter_gather_search(plan, client, search_req, topology, policy, strategy).await\n764\t}\n765\t\n766\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n767\t// Mock client\n768\t// ---------------------------------------------------------------------------\n769\t\n770\t#[derive(Debug, Clone, Default)]\n771\tpub struct MockNodeClient {\n772\t    pub responses: HashMap<NodeId, Value>,\n773\t    pub preflight_responses: HashMap<NodeId, PreflightResponse>,\n774\t    pub errors: HashMap<NodeId, NodeError>,\n775\t    pub delay_ms: u64,\n776\t}\n777\t\n778\timpl NodeClient for MockNodeClient {\n779\t    async fn search_node(\n780\t        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &SearchRequest,\n781\t    ) -> std::result::Result<Value, NodeError> {\n782\t        let _ = self.delay_ms;\n783\t        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n784\t        Ok(self.responses.get(node).cloned().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n785\t            serde_json::json!({\"hits\": [], \"estimatedTotalHits\": 0, \"processingTimeMs\": 0, \"facetDistribution\": {}})\n786\t        }))\n787\t    }\n788\t\n789\t    async fn preflight_node(\n790\t        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &PreflightRequest,\n791\t    ) -> std::result::Result<PreflightResponse, NodeError> {\n792\t        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n793\t        Ok(self.preflight_responses.get(node).cloned().unwrap_or_else(|| {\n794\t            PreflightResponse { total_docs: 1000, avg_doc_length: 50.0, term_stats: HashMap::new() }\n795\t        }))\n796\t    }\n797\t\n798\t    async fn write_documents(\n799\t        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &WriteRequest,\n800\t    ) -> std::result::Result<WriteResponse, NodeError> {\n801\t        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n802\t        Ok(WriteResponse {\n803\t            success: true,\n804\t            task_uid: Some(1),\n805\t            message: None,\n806\t            code: None,\n807\t            error_type: None,\n808\t        })\n809\t    }\n810\t\n811\t    async fn delete_documents(\n812\t        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &DeleteByIdsRequest,\n813\t    ) -> std::result::Result<DeleteResponse, NodeError> {\n814\t        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n815\t        Ok(DeleteResponse {\n816\t            success: true,\n817\t            task_uid: Some(1),\n818\t            message: None,\n819\t            code: None,\n820\t            error_type: None,\n821\t        })\n822\t    }\n823\t\n824\t    async fn delete_documents_by_filter(\n825\t        &self, node: &NodeId, _address: &str, _request: &DeleteByFilterRequest,\n826\t    ) -> std::result::Result<DeleteResponse, NodeError> {\n827\t        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n828\t        Ok(DeleteResponse {\n829\t            success: true,\n830\t            task_uid: Some(1),\n831\t            message: None,\n832\t            code: None,\n833\t            error_type: std::result::Result<FetchDocumentsResponse, NodeError> {\n840\t        if let Some(err) = self.errors.get(node) { return Err(err.clone()); }\n841\t        Ok(FetchDocumentsResponse {\n842\t            results: Vec::new(),\n843\t            limit: request.limit,\n844\t            offset: request.offset,\n845\t            total: 0,\n846\t        })\n847\t    }\n848\t\n849\t    fn get_task_status(\n850\t        &self,\n851\t        node: &NodeId,\n852\t        _address: &str,\n853\t        _request: &TaskStatusRequest,\n854\t    ) -> impl std::future::Future<Output = std::result::Result<TaskStatusResponse, NodeError>> + Send {\n855\t        let node = node.clone();\n856\t        let task_uid = _request.task_uid;\n857\t        let error = self.errors.get(&node).cloned();\n858\t        async move {\n859\t            if let Some(err) = error {\n860\t                return Err(err);\n861\t            }\n862\t            Ok(TaskStatusResponse {\n863\t                task_uid,\n864\t                status: \"succeeded\".to_string(),\n865\t                error: None,\n866\t                error_type: None,\n867\t            })\n868\t        }\n869\t    }\n870\t}\n871\t\n872\t#[cfg(test)]\n873\tmod tests {\n874\t    use super::*;\n875\t    use crate::topology::{Node, NodeId};\n876\t\n877\t    fn make_test_topology() assert!(extract_query_terms(&None).is_empty());\n998\t    }\n999\t\n1000\t    #[test]\n1001\t    fn test_global_idf_aggregation() {\n1002\t        let resp = vec![\n1003\t            PreflightResponse { total_docs: 50000, avg_doc_length: 50.0, term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"a\".into(), TermStats { df: 5000 })]) },\n1004\t            PreflightResponse { total_docs: 50000, avg_doc_length: 60.0, }\n1018\t\n1019\t    #[tokio::test]\n1020\t    async fn test_execute_preflight() {\n1021\t        let topo = make_test_topology();\n1022\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64);\n1023\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1024\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1025\t            total_docs: 30000, avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n1026\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"search\".into(), TermStats { df: 3000 })]),\n1027\t        });\n1028\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-1\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1029\t            total_docs: 30000, avg_doc_length: 55.0,\n1030\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"search\".into(), TermStats { df: 2500 })]),\n1031\t        });\n1032\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-2\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1033\t = make_test_topology();\n1045\t        let plan = plan_search_scatter(&topo, 0, 2, 64);\n1046\t        let mut c = MockNodeClient::default();\n1047\t        c.responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), serde_json::json!({\"hits\": [{\"id\": \"a\", \"_rankingScore\": 0.9}], \"estimatedTotalHits\": 1, \"processingTimeMs\": 5}));\n1048\t        c.preflight_responses.insert(NodeId::new(\"node-0\".into()), PreflightResponse {\n1049\t            total_docs: 50000, avg_doc_length: 50.0,\n1050\t            term_stats: HashMap::from([(\"test\".into(), TermStats { df: 500 })]),\n1051\t        });\n1052\t        let s = crate::merger::RrfStrategy::default_strategy();\n1053\t        let r = dfs_query_then_fetch_search(plan, &c, make_req(), &topo, UnavailableShardPolicy::Partial, &s).await.unwrap();\n1054\t        assert!(!r.degraded);\n1055\t        assert!(!r.hits.is_empty());\n1056\t    }\n1057\t\n1058\t    /// Integration test for dfs_query_then_fetch with severely skewed shard distribution.\n1059\t    ///\n1060\t    /// This test simulates the scenario described in miroir-yio:\n1061\t    /// - Shard 0: Normal (1,000 docs, term df = 100)\n1062\t    /// - Shard 1: 100x normal (100,000 docs, term df = 10,000)\n1063\t    /// - Shard 2: Near-empty (10 docs, term df = 1)\n1064\t    ///\n1065\t    /// Without global IDF preflight, each shard would compute different local IDF values:\n1066\t    /// - Shard 0: IDF ≈ log((1000 - 100 + 0.5) / (100 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n1067\t    /// - Shard 1: IDF ≈ log((100000 - 10000 + 0.5) / (10000 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n1068\t    /// - Shard 2: IDF ≈ log((10 - 1 + 0.5) / (1 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.8\n1069\t    ///\n1070\t    /// With global IDF preflight, all shards use the same IDF:\n1071\t    /// - Global: N = 101,010, df = 10,101\n1072\t    /// - IDF ≈ log((101010 - 10101 + 0.5) / (10101 + 0.5)) + 1 ≈ 2.3\n1073\t    ///\n1074\t    /// This ensures scores are comparable across shards, enabling correct score-based merge.\n1075\t    #[tokio::test]\n1076\t    async fn test_dfs_skewed_shards_global_idf_aggregation() {\n1077\t
